items.title: Engadget Podcast: Who needs Valve's Steam Machine?
items.summary: This week on the Engadget Podcast, we've got our first impressions of Valve's pricey Steam Machine, and we chat about Sony dumping PlayStation discs in 2028.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
